productions.topic: Why Fire Hydrants Are Different Colors
productions.prompt_used: Create a 50 second YouTube Short titled "Why Fire Hydrants Are Different Colors". Open in the first 3 seconds with three differently colored fire hydrants and the narration "These colors could determine whether firefighters save your house." Then explain why hydrants are painted different colors, what major colors indicate, how firefighters use colors for flow rating, why flow rate matters in a fire, and why two nearby hydrants can have different ratings. Use cinematic camera pushes, drone establishing shots, close-ups, animated color labels, water flow visualization, map graphics, motion graphics, professional captions, and ambient suburban neighborhood daytime audio. Style: documentary science educator.

upload_package.topic: Why Fire Hydrants Are Different Colors

productions.topic: Are Leprechauns Real? The Truth Behind Ireland's Tiny Tricksters
productions.prompt_used: Create a 50 second YouTube Short titled "Are Leprechauns Real? The Truth Behind Ireland's Tiny Tricksters". Open in the first 3 seconds with a curiosity-gap cold open and the narration: "What if I told you millions of people know the name 'leprechaun'—but almost nobody knows where the legend actually came from?" Cover: what a leprechaun is in Irish folklore; Celtic mythology origins; why they are associated with gold; why they wear green today; clearly distinguish folklore from historical evidence; end with one surprising memorable fact. Visual priority: real Irish landscapes, ancient castles, forests, historical artwork, cinematic AI recreations; animated diagrams only if necessary. Avoid slideshow. Cinematic camera movement throughout. Tone: curious, cinematic, mysterious, educational documentary. Thumbnail concept: mysterious leprechaun silhouette, glowing pot of gold, dramatic Irish landscape, bold text "THE TRUTH ABOUT LEPRECHAUNS". Sound: subtle Celtic-inspired underscore, forest ambience, light cinematic risers. Dynamic captions highlighting key words. Publishing disabled.

upload_package.topic: Are Leprechauns Real? The Truth Behind Ireland's Tiny Tricksters

productions.topic: Are Leprechauns Real? The Truth Behind Ireland's Tiny Tricksters
productions.prompt_used: Create a 55 second YouTube Short titled "Are Leprechauns Real? The Truth Behind Ireland's Tiny Tricksters". Cold open (0-3s) must speak this exact hook first: "What if I told you millions of people know the name 'leprechaun'—but almost nobody knows where the legend actually came from?" Then teach: what a leprechaun is in Irish folklore; Celtic mythology origins; why gold treasure entered the legend; why green clothing became standard later; clearly separate folklore from historical evidence; close on one surprising memorable fact viewers will remember. Narration only — curious cinematic mysterious educational documentary voice. Do not mention music, sound design, captions, thumbnails, or publishing in the spoken script.

upload_package.topic: Are Leprechauns Real? The Truth Behind Ireland's Tiny Tricksters

productions.topic: The Parasite You May Never Know You Have
productions.prompt_used: Create a 55 second YouTube Short titled "The Parasite You May Never Know You Have". Cast permanent character The Doctor (CHAR-0001) only — do not invent a presenter. Location: Generational Medical Research Institute. Open in the first 3 seconds with eye contact and narration "Millions of people carry this parasite… and many never realize it." Then explain Trichomonas vaginalis as a microscopic parasite, sexual transmission, frequent lack of symptoms, possible symptoms, why testing matters, and that effective treatment is available through healthcare providers. Tone: professional, curious, respectful, evidence-based, reassuring, cinematic. Reduce stigma. Use medical holograms, living lab backgrounds, stylized parasite animation clearly labeled as educational visualization. ElevenLabs voice as The Doctor.

upload_package.topic: The Parasite You May Never Know You Have
